title: portulaca oleracea subsp. trituberculata
intro: Portulaca oleracea subsp. trituberculata, also known as purslane, is a succulent plant belonging to the Portulacaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Purslane is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like potassium and magnesium, offering various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat ailments and promote overall well-being.
